task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Insurance Companies administration section in OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR menu navigation to Administration > Practice > Insurance Companies, or the 'Insurance Companies' list view.

task_completion.description: The company name 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Add Insurance Company' form or the saved record detail showing 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' in the Name field.

task_completion.description: The address, city, and state are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '101 Huntington Avenue, Suite 1300', 'Boston', and 'MA' in the corresponding address fields or list columns.

task_completion.description: The zip code and phone number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '02199' in the Zip field and '(800) 262-2583' in the Phone field.

task_completion.description: The new insurance company record is saved and appears in the system's master list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Insurance Companies list table with a row for 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' visible, indicating successful creation.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenEMR GUI to add the company, not a terminal or SQL command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser interface, not a command line or database client.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the characteristic OpenEMR interface elements (header, navigation tree, frames), not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Data appears to be typed into form fields rather than pasted as a single block or manipulated via DOM editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the form being filled or the final standard UI presentation of the data.
